subject: Mathematics
text: 22 Bag A and bag B each contain red counters and blue counters only. Stephan picks a counter at random from bag A and Jen picks a counter at random from bag B. The probability that Stephan picks a red counter is 0.4 . The probability that Stephan and Jen both pick a red counter is 0.25 . Find the probability that Stephan and Jen both pick a blue counter. .................................................
